title: Unforgettable Climb
commentText: Flawless organization from Tenzing and the team.

title: Stunning vistas
commentText: The trail was tough but Carlos was an amazing guide.

title: Luxury execution
commentText: Boutique refuges were spectacular. Worth every single Euro.

title: Abrupt Cancellation
commentText: Trip called off due to climate issues; slow refund processing.

title: Pure Magic
commentText: Wild Milford track, executed beautifully by Kiwi Backcountry.

title: Wild Patagonia
commentText: Crazy winds but Sofia managed the group safely.

title: Great Backcountry Trip
commentText: Tough hike but scenery makes up for it.

title: Crowded Trails
commentText: The sunrise trek route was a bit packed, but summit view was top tier.
